contextBanner: [TBG | Continue Visible Trade Cycle | operator/runtime handoff | branch: agent/route-automation-operator-plan]
purpose: Load an explicitly identified save, give the operator truthful hotkey control, travel through Bannerlord movement, arrive at a town, perform a real trade, and make the trading state visible without cheats or fabricated deltas.
allowedScope: town arrival and trade execution through Bannerlord mechanisms
in-game notices and linked machine evidence
bounded operator stop and abort controls
forbiddenScope: free gold, items, mounts, stamina, XP, or movement
route-start-only claims presented as arrival or trade
command ACK presented as asynchronous completion
unnamed native Continue presented as exact-save proof
sell, craft, horse, or companion automation claims beyond implemented mechanisms
stale or different-target evidence accepted as current PASS

operatorEntry.currentLimitation: Native Continue does not prove the selected save identity; the target terminal-waiting CMD is not implemented.

orderedHandoffs.input: requested save or native Continue intent

orderedHandoffs.requiredOutput: effective global and per-engine modes shown to operator

orderedHandoffs.input: Automation permission or explicit Hybrid command
orderedHandoffs.requiredOutput: correlated route request with exact target
positive distance, clock running, no immediate hold
town arrival and trade surface state

orderedHandoffs.input: one real Bannerlord buy or sell
orderedHandoffs.requiredOutput: gold delta, inventory delta, item identity, visible user feedback
English summary, machine result, blocker/next action, terminal state

currentBlockers: exact loaded-save identity is not emitted by native Continue
current route branch needs fresh town-menu movement proof
